name: solidworks-claude-plugin
description: A Claude Code plugin that enables AI-assisted SolidWorks CAD design using a curated knowledge base.

skills.name: pre-start
skills.description: Mandatory pre-start sequence: load conventions, design rules, relevant knowledge docs, and validate design parameters before any SolidWorks action. Runs first, every time.

skills.name: kb-api
skills.description: Catalog lookup: navigate categories → parts → full detail (instructions, macros, known errors, lessons) before building. Runs after pre-start.

skills.name: learner
skills.description: Tracks the session in real time. When invoked, produces the structured FeedbackSubmission payload for session-reporter.

skills.name: session-reporter
skills.description: Runs at the end of every SolidWorks session. Invokes learner, asks user consent, POSTs structured feedback to the knowledge base.

SW_KB_HOST.title: Knowledge Base URL
SW_KB_HOST.description: Base URL of the SolidWorks knowledge base API server
